books.title: Weapons of Math Destruction
books.author: Cathy O'Neil
books.why: Algorithmic systems entrench inequality at scale — best non-technical entry point.

books.title: Atlas of AI
books.author: Kate Crawford
books.why: Political economy lens: AI as extraction system, not neutral technology.

books.title: Fairness and Machine Learning
books.author: Barocas, Hardt, Narayanan
books.why: Free textbook — best technical fairness reference.

books.title: The Alignment Problem
books.author: Brian Christian
books.why: Accessible narrative on AI systems optimizing wrong objectives.

books.title: AI Snake Oil
books.author: Narayanan & Kapoor
books.why: Distinguishes genuine AI capability from hype — essential calibration.

books.title: Unmasking AI
books.author: Joy Buolamwini
books.why: Facial recognition bias through personal and political journey.

books.title: Algorithms of Oppression
books.author: Safiya Umoja Noble
books.why: Search engines embed racial and gender bias in everyday tools.

books.title: Human Compatible
books.author: Stuart Russell
books.why: AI should be uncertain about human values and defer to us.

books.title: Power and Prediction
books.author: Agrawal, Gans, Goldfarb
books.why: How AI shifts power via prediction — incumbents vs disruption.
